title: How Bangladeshi Freelancers Accept International Payments: My Unfiltered Take After Helping Hundreds of Creators — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: As a digital creator in Bangladesh, you're no stranger to the woes of getting paid for your online work. The country's restrictive payment landscape, coupled with the limitations imposed by popular platforms like PayPal and Stripe, makes it a daunting task to receive international payments. I've seen countless creators struggle with the same issues, and that's why I'm here to give you the unfiltered truth about how to accept international payments as a Bangladeshi freelancer.
The Honest Reality Most Creators Avoid

The harsh reality is that Bangladesh's financial system is not conducive to online transactions, making it nearly impossible to receive payments from international clients. This is due to the limited banking infrastructure, strict regulations, and high fees associated with traditional payment methods. As a result, most creators are forced to rely on local payment systems, which often come with their own set of limitations and risks.
Why the Popular Advice Is Wrong

You've probably come across articles and tutorials that suggest using alternative payment methods like cryptocurrency or online wallets. While these options may seem promising, they often come with their own set of complexities and risks. For instance, cryptocurrency transactions can be unpredictable, and online wallets may have strict requirements and fees. I've seen creators get burned by these 'solutions' and end up losing valuable time and money.
What the Data and Experience Actually Show

After working with hundreds of creators in Bangladesh, I've seen firsthand the impact of these restrictive payment systems. The data is clear: most creators are being held back by the lack of flexible and reliable payment options. This is why I've dedicated myself to helping creators find alternative solutions that work. With the right tools and know-how, you can break free from the limitations of traditional payment systems and start receiving international payments with ease.
Blockchain-based payment platforms like NOWPayments can help you accept payments without a traditional bank account.
The Uncomfortable Truth About Your Options

The truth is, there are limited options available for Bangladeshi creators looking to accept international payments. However, there are solutions that can help. One option is to use a blockchain-based payment platform like NOWPayments, which allows you to accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies without the need for a traditional bank account. By leveraging these solutions, you can start receiving international payments and expand your business globally.
What You Should Do Based on All of This

So what can you do to start accepting international payments as a Bangladeshi freelancer? First, you need to understand your options and choose a solution that works best for you. Second, you need to take control of your payment process and avoid relying on traditional payment methods. Finally, you need to be proactive and adapt to the changing landscape of online payments. With the right mindset and tools, you can overcome the challenges of payment restrictions and build a successful online business.
